reply:
(1) This device is an Allen-Bradley Micro820 Programmable Logic Controller (PLC). It's used to control and automate industrial processes.

(2) The most likely cause is a PLC's input module or wiring issue, as the safety relay input is not energizing despite 24V at the coil terminals.

(3) The tech should check the input module's status and wiring connections. If the input module is faulty, replace it.
